-------------------------------------------------------------------
emittedFile:sourceMapUnclosedBlock.lua
sourceFile:sourceMapUnclosedBlock.tlua
-------------------------------------------------------------------
>>>do
1 >
2 >^^^^->
1 >
1 >Emitted(1, 1) Source(1, 1) + SourceIndex(0)
---
>>>end
1->^^^
2 >   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^->
1->{
1->Emitted(2, 4) Source(1, 2) + SourceIndex(0)
---
>>>//# sourceMappingURL=sourceMapUnclosedBlock.lua.map
